content.text:
Looking at the image, the track curves gently to the left ahead with the dashed center line visible, and the car appears to be on course following the left-hand curve smoothly.

Target waypoint: nearest_waypoints[1] + 5 = 38 + 5 = 43
Waypoint 43: (6.2298, 2.7700)
Car position: (6.7707, 2.2685)
Bearing = atan2(2.7700 - 2.2685, 6.2298 - 6.7707) = atan2(0.5015, -0.5409)
= 180 - atan2(0.5015, 0.5409) = 180 - 42.8° = 137.2°
Current heading: 121.85°
Delta = 137.2 - 121.85 = 15.35° → left
